title: Show Calculated Group Average from one board to another
excerpt:

posts.author: BuffyBishop (Buffy Bishop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a board that shows the average number of days since a specific action has taken place (see yellow highlighted value in screenshot). Is there a way to show this number on another board? Or a calculation that pulls this number into a cell on another board?

Screenshot 2025-04-08 121946686×490 43.2 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you use a dashboard to pull that data to? Or does it need to be a table?

posts.author: BuffyBishop (Buffy Bishop)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Desiree, Thank you for your response. It needs to be a table. For now I added a mirror column on the source board. It’s a work-around for the moment.
